Name: Add Shield
Description: Type 1 = ModifyItemOnAll. Adds the item to every profile in the unit. Used to give shields to the whole Foot Soldier unit.

Name: Upgrade to Veterans
Description: Type 0 = SwapUnit. Replaces the entire unit with a different unit entry. See modifiedunit.json for the unit mapping.

Name: Replace Sword with Lance
Description: Type 1 = ModifyItemOnAll. Adds a lance to every model in the Knights unit.

Name: Swap Sword for Magic Staff
Description: Type 4 = ModifyItemOnSingle. Modifies one specific profile instead of the whole unit. The actual items to remove/add are defined in modifiedprofile.json, keyed by this option's Id.
